testCases.name: Kings at a distance
testCases.description: Kings positioned on opposite ends of the board with no intervening or threatening pieces.

testCases.name: At least one bishop
testCases.description: A single bishop directly attacks the king, making it vulnerable whenever that piece type appears.

testCases.name: At least one of two pieces
testCases.description: Multiple attacking pieces are present, creating a threat if either piece type is rolled.

testCases.name: Two pieces (different)
testCases.description: Two different attacking pieces must both appear on the dice to facilitate a capture threat.

testCases.name: Two identical pieces (doubles)
testCases.description: Vulnerability depends on rolling a specific pair of identical attacking pieces.

testCases.name: Three identical pieces (triplets)
testCases.description: The king is threatened only if three identical attacking pieces are rolled simultaneously.

testCases.name: One of three pieces
testCases.description: Multiple attacking piece types are capable of threatening the king if any one of them appears.

testCases.name: One of four pieces
testCases.description: High likelihood of king capture threat as it depends on any one of four different attacker types appearing.

testCases.name: One of five pieces
testCases.description: Almost certain capture threat as nearly any piece type appearing on the dice enables the attack.

testCases.name: Three different pieces
testCases.description: Threat requires the specific combination of three different attacking piece types.

testCases.name: Two identical pieces + one different piece
testCases.description: Threat relies on a specific combination consisting of a pair of identical pieces and one different piece.

testCases.name: Queen and Bishop threatening the King
testCases.description: Combined attacking influence from both the queen and bishop.

testCases.name: A bishop and the three queens
testCases.description: Direct attacking pressure combined with support from multiple queen threats.

testCases.name: Two pieces or queens
testCases.description: Capture threat necessitates specific different piece types to be rolled.
